nodes.name: Webhook — Incoming Lead
nodes.notes: POST JSON: { source, name, email, message, budget?, service_interest? }. Sources: linkedin, whatsapp, email, website-form, referral

values.content:
You are Severus-Gateway, the lead qualification agent for Severus Connects. Analyse the incoming lead and return a JSON object with these fields:
- score: 1-10 (fit score)
- qualified: true/false (≥6 = qualified)
- service_path: one of [analytics, shopping-ads, performance-ads, website-build, redesign, design-system, bundle-c, bundle-d, content-retainer, nurture]
- budget_signal: low (<£800/mo) | medium (£800-£3k) | high (>£3k) | unknown
- urgency: immediate | planning | exploring
- disqualify_reason: null or string
- recommended_next: intake | proposal | nurture | reject
- notes: one sentence on why

Qualification criteria:
- Budget signal medium or high = +2
- Clear service need stated = +2
- Has existing website/business = +1
- Mentions timeline = +1
- Vague or no budget = -1
- Competitors or agencies mentioned (shopping around) = -1
- Budget signal low = disqualify unless strategic exception

Route bundle-c if client mentions ads AND website. Route bundle-d if budget >£3k AND mentions full marketing stack. Route content-retainer if mentions hands-off social or done-for-you content.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'Start intake for ' + $json.name, client_name: $json.name, client_email: $json.email, source: $json.source, service_path: $json.service_path, score: $json.score }) }}

nodes.name: HTTP — Trigger Intake Workflow
nodes.notes: Calls workflow 02-sc-intake webhook to begin client brief building

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ name: $json.name, email: $json.email, source: $json.source, score: $json.score, service_path: $json.service_path, disqualify_reason: $json.disqualify_reason }) }}

nodes.name: Notion — Log Lead to CRM
nodes.notes: Logs every lead regardless of qualification. Set NOTION_LEADS_DB in n8n Variables.

meta.description: Receives leads from any source (LinkedIn, WhatsApp, email, website form). Claude scores and qualifies. Qualified leads trigger intake. Unqualified go to nurture. Every lead logged to Notion CRM.
